metadata.dc:title: Statistical database on the prevalence of mental health disorders, risk factors, and protective variables in Latin American university populations. Compiled through systematic search using Perplexity AI, synthesizing indexed academic literature from
metadata.dc:creator: Juan Moisés de la Serna Tuya

metadata.dc:description: Statistical database on the prevalence of mental health disorders, risk factors, and protective variables in Latin American university populations. Compiled through systematic search using Perplexity AI, synthesizing indexed academic literature from
metadata.dc:subject: academic-stress, anxiety, cc0, dataset, depression, latin-america, mental-health, open-data, protective-variables, risk-factors, university-students, zenodo
